programme.title: Canada: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: The wildlife of Canada throughout summer, as they strive to make the most of what the season has to offer before the weather once more takes a turn for the worst. Mountain goat kids follow their mothers on an epic journey to a mineral-rich spring, while caribou have to keep moving to avoid the mosquitos that can suck up to three pints of their blood throughout the season. Meanwhile, the polar bears are unable to hunt until the sea freezes over, leaving them trapped on land with precious little to eat(n)

programme.title: Secret Scotland
programme.desc: Comedian Susan Calman continues her journey in Ayrshire, where she visits the birthplace of Robert Burns and gets to see a precious artefact normally kept in a fireproof safe. Moving on to the Isle of Arran, she learns the tricks of foraging and puts her sense of smell to the test, before heading to Culzean Castle and learning the story behind Peter Pan in Dumfries. The tour concludes by travelling in a kayak to Pladda Lighthouse(n)

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: The singer visits York, where she gets to grips with the city's past with a history walk and a ghost tour. She also manages to cram in a flight on a 1940s tiger moth plane, a visit to the Viking museum and a trip to Bettys cafe. James and Ola Jordan head to an adults-only inclusive hotel on the island of Crete, just outside Rethymmon, where they indulge in some peace and quiet with walks around the town, lots of delicious food, a massage and a boat trip. Plus, Johnny Ball takes a solo trip to Pisa, exploring the city on bicycle before exploring heading onwards to Siena(n)

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels
programme.desc: The Ritz ranks high among London's most legendary hotels, one that has been synonymous with luxury and wealth, as well as being a bastion of privilege for over 100 years. Situated on Piccadilly, just a stone's throw from Buckingham Palace, it has been a home from home for the royal family since the reign of Edward VII. The Ritz has redefined service in luxury hotels, introducing the now-universal concept of the customer always being right. This programme examines its heritage, its famous afternoon teas and the scandalous history of its founder, Cesar Ritz(n)

Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Sam Worthington(n)

programme.desc: Historian Suzannah Lipscomb examines the extraordinary story of the tumultuous love affair between Henry VIII and Anne Boleyn, exploring what brought them together and tore them apart. She visits the places where Henry and Anne lived, loved and fought, and uses dramatic reconstructions and first-hand accounts to delve into their passionate and volatile relationship(n)

programme.title: Digging Up Britain's Past
programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands search for the remains of a First World War stable at Catterick Garrison in North Yorkshire, where thousands of horses would have been housed and trained for the front line. They join a team comprised of archaeologists and the military attempting to uncover the role this building played in the war effort. They also visit Britain's oldest cavalry regiment, examining tools that soldiers would have used to look after their steeds, and hear the story of Warrior, known as the horse the German's could not kill(n)

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways

From Matlock to the spa town splendour of Buxton, Rob unearths a tale of Victorian ambition, as he travels along a route filled with great engineering, which is now a beloved part of the Peak District National Park(n)

programme.title: Robin and Marian (1976)
programme.desc: Outlaw Robin Hood returns to England after the Crusades and goes in search of his beloved Marian, who is now an abbess, and crosses swords once again with old enemy the Sheriff of Nottingham. Medieval adventure, starring Sean Connery, Audrey Hepburn, Robert Shaw, Nicol Williamson, Ronnie Barker, Denholm Elliott and Richard Harris(n)

programme.title: Shane (1953)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunfighter intervenes when a man and his family are threatened by a predatory cattle baron determined to force every homesteader in the valley off the land. The situation rapidly escalates into violence, while an unspoken attraction develops between the gunman and the settler's wife. Western, starring Alan Ladd, Jack Palance, Van Heflin and Jean Arthur. Based on the novel by Jack Schaefer(n)

programme.title: Exodus: Gods and Kings (2014)
programme.desc: Moses, the adoptive brother of the pharaoh of Egypt, is sent into exile, where he receives a message from God demanding he set all the country's slaves free. When his brother refuses to comply, the kingdom is struck by a series of devastating plagues. Biblical epic, starring Christian Bale, Joel Edgerton, Sigourney Weaver and John Turturro(n)

programme.title: The Lighthouse Interview Special
programme.desc: Actors Willem Dafoe and Robert Pattinson talk about going to extremes in The Lighthouse, an eerie new drama from the director of The Witch, Robert Eggers(n)

programme.title: X-Men Origins: Wolverine (2009)
programme.desc: Years before he joins the superhero team, mutant Logan is a member of a top secret military unit, but quits because he cannot justify his squad's brutal methods. However, when the woman he loves is murdered by his psychotic brother, Logan returns to his old enemies for help in seeking revenge - and is offered the chance to become indestructible. Superhero adventure prequel, starring Hugh Jackman and Liev Schreiber(n)

programme.title: RoboCop (2014)
programme.desc: A corporation that creates military robots seizes a chance to diversify into law enforcement when a Detroit cop is critically injured in a bombing. He is rebuilt as a crime-fighting cyborg, but struggles to regain his free will from his creators' control. Sci-fi thriller remake, starring Joel Kinnaman, Gary Oldman, Michael Keaton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: Seoul Station (2016)
programme.desc: Three people work together to try to survive a rapidly spreading zombie pandemic that has been unleashed in downtown Seoul. Animated horror prequel to Train to Busan, with the voice of Seung-ryong Ryu. In Korean(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett(n)

programme.title: Edward Scissorhands (1990)
programme.desc: A reclusive genius creates a boy but dies before completing him, leaving his brainchild with scissor-like blades in place of hands. A kindly woman from a nearby suburb takes pity on the lonely figure and welcomes him into her home. He quickly becomes a hit in the neighbourhood - but then his new friends start to turn against him. Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price(n)

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen(n)

programme.title: The Monuments Men (2014)
programme.desc: Seven experts in fine art are assembled into a military platoon during the Second World War, and given an unusual mission. They are sent into occupied Europe to recover priceless works of art that have fallen into Nazi hands and ensure the masterpieces survive the conflict. Fact-based drama, directed by and starring George Clooney. With Matt Damon, Bill Murray and Cate Blanchett(n)

programme.title: The Personal History of David Copperfield Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Armando Iannucci and actor Dev Patel, who stars in the title role, talk about bringing Charles Dickens' beloved novel to the screen(n)

programme.title: Taken 3 (2014)
programme.desc: In the final part of the blockbusting big-screen trilogy, ex-CIA agent Bryan Mills' efforts to finally live a quiet life are shattered by the death of his ex-wife, Lenore. Just when things seemingly can't get any worse, he is framed for her murder and must fight to clear his name. Taken 2 director Olivier Megaton returns for this action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Forest Whitaker, Maggie Grace and Dougray Scott(n)

programme.title: Train to Busan (2016)
programme.desc: Hedge-fund manager Seok-woo sets off on a train journey with his small daughter, but as their train is about to leave the station a very sick passenger stumbles aboard - affected by a chemical spill that turns creatures and people into zombies. The virus spreads fast from carriage to carriage, and Seok-woo must join with other unaffected passengers and fight to save his own life and that of his child. South Korean horror, starring Yoo Gong and Yu-mi Jung. In Korean and Hawaiian(n)

programme.title: The Hallow (2015)
programme.desc: A conservationist moves to Ireland with his family, making a new home in a remote house near a forest. He finds the house is infested with a sinister fungus, but worse is to come when the woods unleash a terrifying array of supernatural creatures from local folklore. Horror, starring Joseph Mawle, Bojana Novakovic and Michael Smiley(n)

programme.title: Doctor Dolittle (1967)
programme.desc: A Victorian veterinary surgeon is certified insane after developing the ability to talk to his patients in their own language. Undaunted, he manages to escape from the asylum and embarks on a quest to locate a rare aquatic snail. Oscar-winning musical comedy, with Rex Harrison, Samantha Eggar, Richard Attenborough and Anthony Newley. Songs include Talk to the Animals and I've Never Seen Anything Like It(n)

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox(n)

programme.title: Enemy Mine (1985)
programme.desc: In the midst of a war between humans and aliens, two space pilots from opposite sides are marooned together on an inhospitable planet and are forced to set aside their mutual animosity to survive. Sci-fi adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, Louis Gossett Jr and Brion James(n)

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley(n)

programme.title: Beast Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Michael Pearce and actress Jessie Buckley talk about making the dark British drama set on Jersey(n)

programme.title: Hampstead (2017)
programme.desc: An American widow finds unexpected love with a man living wild on Hampstead Heath when they take on the developers who want to destroy his home. Romantic comedy drama, starring Brendan Gleeson, Diane Keaton and James Norton(n)

programme.title: Bullet to the Head (2012)
programme.desc: Two hitmen are betrayed by their employer and one of them is killed, leaving the survivor swearing revenge. His search for the assassin leads him to a police detective investigating the murder of his partner, and they join forces when they realise one man is behind both deaths. Action thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, Sung Kang and Christian Slater(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin goes for brunch with Ted's parents, but worries they will not like her. However, once the meal has got under way, she discovers they have been hiding a huge secret from him. Meanwhile, Lily and Marshall try to adjust to their new relationship(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney gives Ted advice after he has his first big fight with Robin, while Lily persuades them to make up. However, later that night the friends go to a party for lawyers - and Lily and Robin are told Ted has left with another woman. Neil Patrick Harris and Josh Radnor star(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker's girlfriend Vanessa makes Ben's life miserable when she gets the assistant manager job at his bar, and tries to impose new hours and uniforms. However, he seizes an opportunity to get back at her by ruining a large event she is planning. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's feelings are hurt when Riley wants to talk to Danny and not him about her bar exam woes, but she finally tells him that she has taken the test three times without passing. Determined to support his friend, Ben tries to convince her not to give up on her dreams of becoming a lawyer. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster becomes inspired by his hero Albert Einstein and tries to play the violin. Mary thinks that she may be pregnant and goes to buy a pregnancy test with Meemaw(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius moves in with Dr Sturgis for a night to see what it would be like to leave home and go to college. During his absence, a lonely Mary tries to bond with other members of the family(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with guest appearances from Adam West, Wil Wheaton and Stephen Hawking(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Beverly decide to create a music video to help Erica's application to Julliard stand out, but the production does not go as planned. When Murray bonds with Lainey's father Bill, he learns what it means to be a real friend. Tim Meadows and David Koechner guest star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is accepted into a summer arts school, but Murray struggles to express his pride in his daughter. Barry takes up the role of school sports mascot, but fails to realise that students from a rival school are planning to beat up the mascot at an upcoming game(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate an old case belonging to Hitchcock and Scully from the 1980s. Santiago's uniformed officers and Jeffords' detectives fight over limited resources at the precinct building(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Gina attend their 20th anniversary high-school reunion. Back at the precinct, Boyle helps Diaz with a decision about her love life. Meanwhile, Holt, Jeffords, Hitchcock and Scully attempt to identify the mystery sound in a radio show competition(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An embarrassing secret from Howard's past comes to light as he tries to win back Bernadette, while Sheldon and Raj engage in a battle of wills when they have to work in the same office. Guest starring Katee Sackhoff and George Takei(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker arranges for Danny to take part as a guest on Mary Hart's show, but his TV appearance takes a turn when he becomes emotional during the interview. Meanwhile, Ben and Riley have a misunderstanding about Angela. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: When Riley's company is hired to represent a preacher whose life has been hit by scandal, she is charged with making sure the man's wilful daughter stays out of trouble. Meanwhile, Bonnie's new career in real estate soon hits problems. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis is released from mental hospital and unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Wallace Shawn and Annie Potts(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Murray agrees to let him join the junior Reserve Officers Training Corps, Barry changes his mind when the going gets tough and begs Beverly to get him out of it. Adam objects when Pops buys a timeshare holiday home in Florida. Judd Hirsch (Taxi) guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the family's holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called 'Super Hanukkah'. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt and Peralta investigate when three valuable antique coins are stolen from the university where Kevin works as a lecturer. Meanwhile, back at the precinct, Jeffords and Santiago get competitive about taking the squad out for lunch(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon agrees to participate in a series of short lectures at the university, but is worried the students dislike him. Following Amy's advice, he asks Penny to give him acting lessons to help him engage with his audience. Elsewhere, Raj fantasises about his best friend's partner. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is forced to consider how far he is willing to push himself in the name of science when a wealthy benefactor makes an indecent proposal. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, with Jessica Walter (Arrested Development) and Joshua Malina (The West Wing)(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby takes the reins for the final night of the week's competition, with the Geordie Shore star aiming for a party finale with an après-ski-theme. The soirée kicks off with fondue and Charlotte impresses her guests with personalised poems, but after a disastrous DIY dessert she needs to save her night with some banging tunes and a live saxophone player(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nicole Appleton, Mel Blatt, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Chris Kamara, Example, Professor Green, Rylan Clark-Neal, Denise van Outen, Oti Mabuse, Chris Eubank Sr, Chris Eubank Jr, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth, Sheila Hancock, Stanley Johnson, Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Emily Atack, Kate Robbins and Nick Grimshaw appraise TV shows including The Silence of the Lambs, The Andrew Neil Interviews with Jeremy Hunt and Boris Johnson, Killing Eve, Naked Attraction, The £100k Drop, First Dates and Serengeti(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A review of recent shows to hit the small screen, featuring the appearance of celebrity guests in support of Channel 4's 2017 Stand Up to Cancer initiative. The show features Jeremy Corbyn and Jessica Hynes; Liam Gallagher, with his mother Peggy and his son Gene; Freddie Flintoff and Jamie Redknapp; Ed Sheeran, Big Narstie and Example; and Ozzy and Sharon Osbourne. The programmes under scrutiny include University Challenge, Strictly Come Dancing, Nigella: At My Table, Blue Planet II and First Dates. From November 2017(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: During one of their adventures in outer space, Rick and Morty's ship suffers a flat tyre. While they carry out repairs, Morty suffers a potentially lethal snake bite that leads to a complicated, time-travelling encounter with a snake civilisation(n)

programme.title: Mr Pickles
programme.desc: When Tommy enters the soapbox derby he meets an old time greaser who needs help. Elsewhere, Grandpa finds out the one thing Mr Pickles fears(n)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: Freddy Krueger prepares to marry, but needs to know the identity of his father. Plus, the Robot Chicken team reveals what it's like being the daughter of a plastic Army Man. Animated comedy series, created by Seth Green and Matthew Senreich(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick and Morty fall out with the president when he asks them to tackle a monster, while Beth thinks she is a clone when Summer remarks on her positive attitude(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a serial killer, Peralta enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case without the new captain finding out. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including The £100k Drop, The Eurovision Song Contest, Britain's Got Talent, The Andrew Marr Show, Heart Transplant: A Chance to Live, Million Pound Menu, Buy It Now, and Poltergeist receive a grilling from the sharp-eyed armchair critics(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reformed teen rebel and unlikely baker Sunny, 33, is partnered with Misha, but is a cupcake enough to spark a romance between these two self-professed boffins? In a first for the show, 22-year-old twins nervously embark on a double date, with die-hard Cher fan Stephen meeting legal assistant Emily, while his sister Rebecca sits down with engineer Kristian. Plus, there is a special guest at the First Dates restaurant as maitre d' Fred's father visits from France. And naturally, he has a way with the ladies(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin goes for brunch with Ted's parents, but worries they will not like her. However, once the meal has got under way, she discovers they have been hiding a huge secret from him. Meanwhile, Lily and Marshall try to adjust to their new relationship(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success(n)

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: Two US couples from different backgrounds temporarily switch spouses as they navigate emotive issues such as politics, class, gender and race with the ultimate goal of everyone being able to find some common ground. here, the Benners and the McMichaels take part, as a perfectionist wife whose children act like grown-ups swaps places with a stay-at-home dad who thinks life is all about play(n)

programme.title: Epic (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into a forest that her scientist father believes is home to a race of miniature people. She stumbles on the tiny creatures and is shrunk down to their size so she can carry out a quest to save their new queen from an invading army. Animated adventure, with the voices of Amanda Seyfried, Josh Hutcherson, Colin Farrell and Christoph Waltz(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney gives Ted advice after he has his first big fight with Robin, while Lily persuades them to make up. However, later that night the friends go to a party for lawyers - and Lily and Robin are told Ted has left with another woman. Neil Patrick Harris and Josh Radnor star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to help Adam navigate a painless path through puberty, but just as his voice is changing, he is cast in the lead role of the school musical. Determined to help him survive the performance, Beverly decides lip-synching might be the answer. Meanwhile, Murray is irked when Erica chooses musician Johnny over Barry's sidekick Geoff as her date for the homecoming dance(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry accidentally records over one of Beverly's prized family videotapes - her treasured keepsake from his fifth birthday party. Meanwhile, Adam and Murray build a robot together, but the project comes between them when they experience creative differences(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam goes to great lengths to dodge swimming classes, but his plan to avoid the sport could affect his friendship with Dave. Jealousy prompts Barry to undermine Erica when she attempts to make the world a better place by forming a school social awareness club(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is excited to work a case with the best detective in the NYPD, Dave Majors - until his colleague shares his intentions to ask Amy out on a date. Rosa's surprising fashion choice causes a stir, and Charles and Gina make an unexpected discovery. Comedy, with Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt begins to worry he is being set up for a fall by one of his superiors, and Peralta is handed the chance to work on an important case. Meanwhile, Jeffords tries to make sure his twins get a place at their chosen school. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Terry Crews(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Penny's belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon's flat is burgled, so they work on a state-of-the-art security system in a bid to outwit any future would-be thieves. However, their plans go awry when they ensnare Penny in a net. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy are forced to take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon after his epic railway journey ends in chaos. Meanwhile, Howard finds Stuart's relationship with his mother strange, and Penny has an interview for a sales job at Bernadette's workplace. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to teach a course at the university, and Howard surprises the gang when he decides to enrol on it. Meanwhile, Amy plays Penny and Bernadette off against each other while the tension brews over Penny's new job. Comedy, guest starring Regina King (Southland), with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny attempt to prove Sheldon wrong when he claims that he and Amy have a superior relationship. Meanwhile, Howard is nervous when Nasa asks him to throw the first pitch at a baseball game honouring National Space Day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. Programmes under scrutiny include Celebrity First Dates Hotel for SU2C, Britain's Got Talent: The Champions, The Circle Vote Night, Strictly Come Dancing and This Morning, plus the movie A Quiet Place(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including The X Factor: Celebrity, The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex, Own the Sky: Jetpack Dreamers, Celebrity Hunted, Pain, Pus and Poison: The Search for Modern Medicines and the news(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Irreverent panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, in which Joel Dommett, Rosie Jones, Ovie Soko and Catherine Bohart answer questions based on opinion polls(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Star Wars fan John meets fellow sci-fi enthusiast Warren, while trauma surgeon Salam admits to his date Tara that he has never been more nervous than the moment when she arrived. Former reality TV star Aisleyne's date is Darren is a dead ringer for Jason Statham, but is he the alpha male she is looking for, or will his flirtatious banter go too far?(n)

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: Two US couples from different backgrounds temporarily switch spouses as they navigate emotive issues such as politics, class, gender and race with the ultimate goal of everyone being able to find some common ground. here, the Benners and the McMichaels take part, as a perfectionist wife whose children act like grown-ups swaps places with a stay-at-home dad who thinks life is all about play(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Body-confident Ben's plans for a hot-tub wedding may prove to be too much for bride-to-be Hayley, who has always dreamed of a traditional Jewish wedding(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray grows a moustache, it ignites a feud between his wife Beverly and his best friend Bill. Barry is convinced that he's lost Lainey's affections when Erica tells him that his girlfriend is in love with Culture Club singer Boy George. David Koechner guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: At Halloween, Barry and Erica persuade Adam not to go trick-or-treating but to take his girlfriend Dana to a haunted house instead. Beverly attempts to teach Adam a lesson about the dangers of the spooky celebration, but her plan backfires. Dustin Ybarra guest stars(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: After Captain Holt is transferred to the NYPD Department of Public Relations, the arrival of a new captain causes the precinct to dissolve into chaos - despite the best efforts of Sergeant Jeffords. meanwhile, Peralta and Santiago face the aftermath of their kiss. Kyra Sedgwick and Bill Hader guest star(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The division incurs another personnel change that threatens to put Jake and Amy's budding relationship at risk. Meanwhile, Terry assists Holt with an important public relations matter and Rosa and Gina try to convince Charles to rethink his affection for a fellow officer. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake thinks Boyle might have met his soulmate in Genevieve, an art gallery owner, and tries to set the pair up on a date. Meanwhile, Rosa deals with an intra-precinct theft and Amy seeks Holt's help with an image campaign. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a serial killer, Peralta enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case without the new captain finding out. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with the murderer's demands, while Jeffords discovers a new obsession. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Dean Winters, with Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'(n)

programme.title: Forever in My Heart (2019)
programme.desc: While in Ireland on an internship, Jenna falls in love with the Charlie, the son of the owner of the hotel she has been assigned to, but they end up going their separate ways. Five years later, she returns to Ireland and bumps into Charlie again - and it's immediately clear that they still have feelings for one another. Romantic drama, starring Merritt Patterson and Jack Turner(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon develops a mental block and has difficulty working on a formula, so in a move inspired by Albert Einstein he gets a job at the Cheesecake Factory diner to try to revive his creativity - and despite Penny's objections, proves surprisingly effective in the role. Guest starring Yeardley Smith (The voice of Lisa Simpson)(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to visit the Large Hadron Collider in Switzerland and asks Penny to join him as a Valentine's Day treat. However, Sheldon tries to persuade the couple to allow him to take her place(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host this week is Jay Hutton from Tattoo Fixers, whose guests are actor Steven Arnold and Ewen MacIntosh and reality stars Charlotte Crosby and Dawn Ward(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former Coronation Street star Steven Arnold hosts his first ever dinner party, and unwittingly makes the same chicken and mushroom dish that Jay Hutton did the previous night(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Real Housewives of Cheshire star Dawn Ward hosts the third dinner party of the week, and she pulls out all the stops to throw the perfect dinner party for her famous guests(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Ewen MacIntosh of The Office fame serves up an evening of Mexican food, and leaves a lasting impression on his fellow celebrities - for all the wrong reasons(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby takes the reins for the final night of the week's competition, with the Geordie Shore star aiming for a party finale with an après-ski-theme. The soirée kicks off with fondue and Charlotte impresses her guests with personalised poems, but after a disastrous DIY dessert she needs to save her night with some banging tunes and a live saxophone player(n)

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones(n)

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service (2015)
programme.desc: A streetwise teenager is taken under the wing of his dead father's old colleague, an agent working for a super-secret spy organisation. Will the youngster prove to be a chip off the old block by proving useful during a battle against a twisted, hi-tech genius? Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: Star Trek: Discovery
programme.desc: Bypassing Starfleet's orders, Lorca uses the Discovery crew's ultimate asset, the ship itself, in an effort to end the war with the Klingons once and for all(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp introduces new crafts, skills and techniques for interior decoration. In this edition, she reveals how to create a personalised vintage doormat and coasters, using spray paint, old tiles and serviettes(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Kay Havard and Paul Young wish to buy a holiday home for romantic weekends away and to share with family and friends. Scarlette Douglas does her best to impress them with five properties on Spain's Costa Blanca for their budget of £80,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: After spending 15 years living on a Greek island, Lynne and Peter Evans are back in the UK and hankering after a second home in the sun. Fuerteventura has held a special place in their hearts since they first went there on holiday with their two children, so they think it's the perfect place to buy. Ben Hillman needs all of his property know-how as he shows them five great options for their £80,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Lyndi and Les love where they live and the life they have with their three children in the Adelaide suburb of Frewville. But Les has fallen out of love with their house and feels they have outgrown it. Andrew Winter wants to introduce them to the idea of a move, but Neale Whitaker has some great design ideas to reignite their passion for their current home(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Middlesex and Surrey, where projects include repurposing a 1950s hairdryer, updating a school desk and the restoration of a child's motorbike(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel the length of Britain turning unwanted junk into profit for their owners. In this episode they're on the south coast, where Henry gets to work an aircraft fuel tank while Simon gets obsessed with an iconic '60s speedboat(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former pop singer Danny Karne welcomes guests to the Pavilion, his fashion and rock 'n' roll-themed hotel in central London, and the sports car parked outside wows his visitors. But the petrol-head's decision to take his fellow hoteliers to a motoring museum goes down badly when one of them reveals he has no passion for cars(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: John Luce and his partner Pat Sutton invite their fellow hoteliers to the Fox and Duck, a country inn in Therfield, Hertfordshire. The local golf club provides the guests with adequate entertainment, and they appear to bond as they share friendly banter and a spot of singing at the end of the night. However, the following morning brings with it a shower disaster(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave and Debbie Lang, who run the New Inn in Newbridge-on-Wye, Powys, play host. Dave is a keen pig breeder and owns the on-site butcher's shop as well as running a pub, so he serves some of his award-winning pork products for breakfast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Kerstin and Robert Sharpe, the owners of Westleigh Farm in Somerset, play host, and despite the initial cobwebs found by some of the guests, they are soon won over by the size of the showers, the quality of the milk and the generous helpings for breakfast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Spider monkey Mary is 50 and has had 19 children, and the keepers worry that another pregnancy could be risky, so they introduce younger female Kiara to the group in the hope that Mary's long-term partner Popoyan will develop a relationship with her instead. The staff also hope to breed dominant female giant otter Icana with new arrival Diego and plan to bring two feuding sloths closer together, while setting up a speed-dating event for three-legged chameleon Tripod(n)

programme.title: Love It or List It Australia
programme.desc: Real estate expert Andrew Winter and interior design guru Neale Whitaker help newlyweds Nathan and Emily, who live in Oyster Bay in southern Sydney and are at a crossroads over what to do with their home of less than two years. Emily loves it and believes a reworking of the current space will unlock its potential, while Nathan considers it too high-maintenance yard(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend travel to Hartlepool, Co Durham, where they attempt to restore a 1971 classic Volkswagen bay-window camper van that is in desperate need of some tender loving care(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: It's crunch time for Jonathan and Michael who are facing their investors, but their newest idea - to keep goats - does not go down well. Philip and Angelina host the big anniversary party they've been spending weeks preparing for, but with broken toilets and 60 guests to contend with, how will it go? Plus, single mother Fiona battles to get her dining room ready to show off to the mayor(n)

programme.title: Just One Look
programme.desc: A woman and her family leading a peaceful life in France find their world turned upside-down after a photograph arrives in the mail. It depicts four people, including her husband, with a woman's face scratched out. Bastien tells Eva that it isn't him in the photo, before leaving to take the children to a concert. That night, she gets a call claiming Bastien has disappeared, leaving behind the children. Eva learns that her husband has been in contact with the manager of a pole-dancing club and is left to wonder where he is and what has he been up to. Thriller, starring Virginie Ledoyen. In French(n)

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Pressure mounts on Anais to abandon her investigation into the link between the murders and the stock market manipulation. Mathias's search leads him to another of his identities - a painter specialising in abstract, nightmarish self-portraits, who is well known to Marseille collectors. However, as Mathias and Anais get closer to the truth, the military gunmen make another appearance, closely followed by the police. As Anais is arrested for opening fire, Mathias is recognised once more, but this time as an art dealer named Arnaud Chaplain. In French(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients dealt with at King's College Hospital, London include a man who was stabbed in his own home and has injuries to his lung, arm and liver, and an elderly woman injured in a fall. A former international lawyer who lost his wife, family and home to alcoholism decides to make a change after being treated with care and compassion(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 77-year-old former motorbike racer arrives with a potentially deadly swelling of the main artery that could burst at any moment. His only option is major surgery, which could be dangerous at his age. A woman whose boyfriend was killed in a cycling accident a year previously is also injured while on her bike, and a medical technician and a mobile caterer talk about their roles in aiding people to recovery(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Babylon in New York, where the peace of Long Island is regularly shattered by the volatile Pellegrino family, proprietors of Peter's Italian Restaurant. Gordon finds owner Tina's work to save the eatery from oblivion is frequently ruined by the behaviour of her brother, a tyrannical front-of-house manager whose violent temper constantly undermines staff morale(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients dealt with at King's College Hospital, London include a man who was stabbed in his own home and has injuries to his lung, arm and liver, and an elderly woman injured in a fall. A former international lawyer who lost his wife, family and home to alcoholism decides to make a change after being treated with care and compassion(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another chance to see some of the programme's more memorable investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Bulgaria to find out why rose oil is considered liquid gold. Plus, Matt Tebbutt delves into the secret world of baker's yeast to find out what gives sourdough bread its twang, and Kate Quilton explores the power of beetroot(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another chance to see some of the programme's more memorable investigations, including Kate Quilton's investigation into saffron fraud in the Atlas Mountains, Morocco, Mark Tebbutt's exploration of how glace cherries are made and Jimmy Doherty's revelation into what pub grub favourite whitebait actually is(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Young-at-heart couple Natalie and Andy Ray love Florida for its fun-filled attractions and weather, and are looking for a future family holiday home there. Ben Hillman tempts them with five homes within easy reach of the theme parks, all within their budget of £280,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Hyacinth Miller from London first visited Barbados 14 years ago, and now that she's retired, wants to permanently relocate there and spend time in the garden. With her son Leon along to help choose the right property, Jasmine Harman shows Hyacinth five properties in the south of the island, but do any of them have her packing her bags for a new life in the sun?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Maureen and Steve Smith head out to Orlando in Florida to search for a holiday home where they can escape the Scottish winters, with a budget of £80,000(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp meets newlyweds Graeme and Anna, who have relocated from Oxfordshire to Yorkshire only to find their hopes of buying a big, spacious property in a rural location thwarted by a rising market. Phil Spencer helps local couple Sammi and Tom locate their perfect property on a budget of £180,000 in a specific three-mile radius north of Leeds(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Property expert Phil Spencer goes house-hunting in Hertfordshire on behalf of newlyweds Carl and Liz, who want to leave London for a new start in St Albans. Can he find them a home with space that is also well-connected for £425,000? Meanwhile, Kirstie Allsopp assists Naomi, who wants a place in Hemel Hempstead with enough room for her pole-dancing equipment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first dinner date in Middlesbrough glamorous 41-year-old sales assistant Gail hosts a night full of sparkly gourmet grub and teaches her guests a lesson or two in beauty. Her guests are 52-year-old vintage shop owner Jane, 28-year-old football coach Dan, 57-year-old art enthusiast Julie and 47-year-old pub landlord Gary. Gail gets the glitter, sparklers and hair extensions out, but whether her food will get glowing reviews ramins to be seen(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Goalkeeping coach Dan hopes to thrill his guests with a James Bond evening in Middlesbrough, including 007-inspired food and a Bond villain. however, Julie and Jane fail to 'bond' on the night, falling out over everything from who's been the best James Bond, to how to pronounce Roger Moore. Gary and Gail also fall out when the table chat turns to 'lookey-likeys'. After dinner, Dan challenges his guests to put one past him in a penalty shoot-out, which ends with a surprising result(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Middlesbrough, pub landlord Gary plans a 1980s evening, serving classic dishes with a modern twist. However, Jane and Julie are still bickering and Gary falls out with Gail over his dessert. Showman Gary flambés his steaks at the table, and tops things off with a magic display that goes down well with all of his guests - except one(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vintage shop owner Jane serves up a retro menu and a vintage clothes competition in Middlesbrough. Jane's been on the attack at the table so far, but she's planning to be the perfect host this time. On a lively night, there's more drama between the diners, and Julie and Gail discover that Jane has created headlines in the local news(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Middlesbrough, Julie's Indian menu gets mixed reviews, while Gail and Jane make a shoe discovery that leads to some shocking dinner table revelations. Gary finds out how much he's got on Jane's nerves throughout the week, as the contestants candidly reveal what they think of each other(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts in Sancton, East Yorkshire and The North Star Club, owned by Carolyn Van Outersterp, who is joined in the competition by her daughter Galatea, where they hope their peaceful woodland cabins win over their guests. On arrival, guests Luke and John are critical of the cleanliness, and the pricing of the rooms raise eyebrows. At dinner, the reveal of a self-catering breakfast ruffles some feathers, but it's the lack of wi-fi that divides the guests(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Friends B&B in Blackpool, Lancashire run by Luke and John Conway, where a lack of attention to detail in the rooms leaves one critic unimpressed(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Lincoln Holiday Retreat, where guests Luke and John's great first impressions are muddied due to cleanliness concerns(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to The Chapel in Harrogate, North Yorkshire, whose owners Mark Hinchliffe and Heidi Donohoe, pride themselves on offering something a little different in their converted chapel. On arrival, the guests are wowed by the interior and artwork on show. However, Luke and John discover some grime underneath the glamour and Debbie is concerned about her traditional Chinese bed. At dinner, all the guests congratulate Mark and Heidi on their pretty property, but things soon turn ugly when talk turns to the looming payment day as it becomes clear that the B&B'ers have grievances to air(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. The North Star Club is first and owner Carolyn Van Outersterp has some cleanliness issues she wants to brush up on after receiving a score of one earlier in the week(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Cameras follow the paramedic teams of West Midlands Ambulance Service, beginning with a crew treating a man found collapsed in his garden in Birmingham(n)

programme.title: 9/11: 102 Minutes That Changed America
programme.desc: Amateur footage and audiotape recorded by people around New York, giving an insight into their experiences of the September 11 terrorist attacks on the World Trade Centre in 2001. The duration of the tragedy, from the first plane hitting the north tower to the collapse of both buildings, was 102 minutes. During that time, many of the city's residents sought to preserve images of what was taking place. Joined together into a single, seamless historical record, the end result is an intensely personal perspective on events as they unfolded(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The A&E staff of King's College Hospital in London treat patients involved in accidents, including a construction worker who broke his leg in three places and suffered injuries to his chest after being trapped under a cherry picker. Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal allows himself to be led astray by rebellious new arrival Father Damien, and Ted is suspected of being the criminal mastermind behind a scandalous theft. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Joe Rooney(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: Matt Lucas narrates another look back at TV shows from past decades, based on the theme of living dangerously in the 1970s. Clips feature Tony Blackburn climbing into a cage to sing to four fully-grown lions, mainstream comedians who were perfectly comfortable making jokes about domestic violence, and Spike Milligan's comedy multi-racial sitcom Melting Pot, which was considered too controversial and pulled from the air. Contributors include Elis James, Bill Oddie, Jennie Bond and Samira Ahmed(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The A&E staff of King's College Hospital in London treat patients involved in accidents, including a construction worker who broke his leg in three places and suffered injuries to his chest after being trapped under a cherry picker. Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of previous investigations from the programme delving into the secrets behind mass-produced food. In Romania, Kate Quilton discovers how low-price red wine is made and asks if people can really tell the difference between cheap and expensive varieties. Jimmy Doherty looks into the reasons why so many consumers are avoiding gluten, and Matt Tebbutt finds out which part of the pig goes into chewy sweets(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S. Special: 7 Day Challenge
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part special filmed at the British Motor Museum, in which Tim Shaw, Fuzz Townshend and guest Ross Kemp try to restore a Series 2 Land Rover in a week(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S. Special: 7 Day Challenge
programme.desc: Part two of two. Tim and Fuzz race to finish 80-year-old Brian's 1959 Land Rover, while Rick Wakeman drops by to check out their progress and take a spin in his dream car(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Manchester area, 27-year-old full-time mum Johanna, plans an evening dedicated to takeways from Turkey to China and India. Her guests are 34-year-old lorry driver Ryan, 48-year-old housewife Fiona, 45-year-old laundrette owner Linzi and 53-year-old translator Nico, on a night that includes a sojourn into Shakespeare(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, lorry-driving movie buff Ryan plans a film-inspired menu including his 'Prawn Identity' starter, 'Sausage Meat the Fockers' and 'Chocolate Clockwork Orange' desert. Unfortunately the first course is more of a disaster movie for Johanna, who has to face her fear of prawns. Meanwhile, Nico puts the cat among the pigeons with his views on male chefs and Fiona takes Linzi to task over her beauty regime(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous 'domestic delegator' Fiona aims to impress with a classy but effortless menu. However, critical Linzi takes issue with Fiona's mother chopping her vegetables and her cousin making her honeycomb. Then, there's more trouble brewing as Nico and Johanna clash(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Critical laundrette owner Linzi has been a hard taskmaster all week in the Manchester area, so expects to show her guests where they've been going wrong. She's not pleased when Ryan questions her choice of starter. When the guests find out what Linzi does for a job, Nico struggles to understand the concept of a laundrette. Self-proclaimed domestic delegator Fiona has to face her fears during Linzi's entertainment - an ironing competition(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Manchester area, Nico plans to show the Brits how it's done in the kitchen with his Italian cooking. He's been talking up his Italian heritage all week, and Linzi's convinced he's heading for a fall. Ryan's shocked by some of Nico's locker-room tales, while baby of the group Johanna horrifies the other female contestants with her thoughts on gender politics. It remains to be seen who will pick up the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Brockley Hall Hotel in Saltburn-by-the-Sea, North Yorkshire, where owner Heather Garcia and manager Sally Lewis hope to impress their guests(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alistair Richardson welcomes his rivals to his family owned B&B, The Star Inn 1744, in Thrussington, Leicestershire. The refurbished village pub impresses Steve and Tracy, but Heather and Sally's stay gets off to a far from spotless start(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Croft Farm Park in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, where owners Jason and Michelle Jones are keen to show off their new luxury lodges(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests arrive at Harbour Vista in Poole, Dorset, where most of them have been expecting something lavish - so they are surprised to be staying in owner Steve Webster's house(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time, to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores. Heather and Sally from Brockley Hall Hotel want some answers about why one of their rooms didn't scrub up. Plus, Alistair from The Star Inn 1744 queries his guests' cleanliness comments(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Two-and-a-half years have passed since Dick and Angel Strawbridge swapped their flat in Southend for a 19th-century chateau in France costing only £280,000, and in that time, the pair have worked to transform the derelict property into a fairytale castle. However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel look ahead to wedding season, with eight couples booking the chateau for their big day. programme.title: The British Middle Class
programme.desc: Historian and broadcaster Tristram Hunt examines the social class's origins. He discovers how the backlash against the landed aristocracy began with a group of radical thinkers who craved progress and used their money from industry to begin a process of urban enlightenment. However, the growth of mass production led the newly moneyed leaders to move further away from the factories, beginning the trend for suburban living as a mark of status - though it meant the middle classes turning their back on where they came from(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Marine life at the poles, where winter temperatures frequently fall to a numbing -40C. Even when the sun reappears in the spring, its weak rays take a long time to melt the ice. David Attenborough describes how wildlife including seals, whales, polar bears and penguins overcome the elements to survive through prolonged cold spells(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: An exploration of the world's most densely inhabited waters, where variations in temperature owing to the year-long cycle of the sun encourage a vast array of marine life, from seals and sharks in the winter, to lobster and salmon in the summer, dolphins in the autumn and the walking handfish in spring. Narrated by David Attenborough(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet

However, the growth of mass production led the newly moneyed leaders to move further away from the factories, beginning the trend for suburban living as a mark of status - though it meant the middle classes turning their back on where they came from(n)

programme.title: Ronnie Kray and the Pervert Peer
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, the Kray twins rose from small-time racketeers to head the most powerful criminal organisation London had ever seen. This documentary about the affinity between the upper echelons of society and the criminal underclass reveals how they built their empire on fear, violence and extortion - as well as Ronnie's alleged homosexual relationship with a prominent Tory peer(n)

programme.title: SAS: Rogue Warriors
programme.desc: Ben Macintyre concludes his history of formation of the British Army special forces unit. With David Stirling locked away in Hitler's most secure prison Colditz, the leadership of the SAS passed to Paddy Mayne, a man who built his reputation on the battlefield as a warrior of the first rank. In 1943, the SAS leaves the desert for Europe to enter a darker and far more complex theatre of war, where they face the threat of execution and the trauma of civilian casualties, as well as being the first to witness the nightmare of Bergen-Belsen concentration camp(n)

programme.title: Barrymore: The Body in the Pool
programme.desc: In the early hours of March 31, 2001, a phone call was made to Essex emergency services to say a body had been found in the swimming pool of Michael Barrymore - at the time, one of the most popular entertainers in Britain. Every detail of the story was pored over by the media but 19 years on, the death remains unexplained. This documentary looks at the full story, with contributions from Stuart's family, detectives, forensic pathologists and eyewitnesses, to explore what happened that night at Barrymore's Essex home - and the events that followed(n)
