programme.desc: With a budget of 290,000 euros, Lanark couple Denise and Mike seek a holiday haven that will become their 'forever home'. In Alicante, retirees Nigel and Chris seek a holiday home on a 90,000-euro budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Carly and Phil in High Wycombe who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Carly feels like she has had enough of their current house and longs to move into one with more space, but Phil, on the other hand, is content with their four-bed semi and its location(n)

programme.title: Crazy Delicious
programme.desc: Jayde Adams welcomes a molecular gastronomist, a fairytale lover and a comfort food fan into the culinary challenge. She sets them the tasks of making an unusual tomato-based dish and putting their own spin on a chicken pie to impress judges Heston Blumenthal, Niklas Ekstedt and Carla Hall. After these first two rounds, one of the contestants will be eliminated, leaving the remaining two to undertake the last test for the chance to win the golden apple - preparing afternoon tea(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors investigate the underlying medical conditions that may have caused a motorist to crash into a lamppost, while the patient's son and his friend recount the influence she has had on both their lives. A man who fell during the night is treated for possible head trauma, and the father of a three-year-old patient reveals how his stepfather inspired him to be the best parent he can be(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on Northamptonshire police's tackling of hate crime, following PCs Lauren El Sharkawi and Nina Crehan after they investigate a call from a family in Northampton who have been subjected to racist abuse from a neighbour. The police are also experiencing a surge in homophobic and transphobic abuse and are called to deal with one incident where the victim being targeted is just 13(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?(n)

programme.title: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Cameras reveal what can go wrong when a dream holiday turns into a nightmare. Footage includes flight delays, hurricanes and worrying hotel rooms, all told by the people who were there. Psychologists and industry experts also reflect on the anxieties and situations that many can experience during a break(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The host takes on a classic 1930s terraced home with a kitchen that's so tiny the fridge and oven have to live in another room. The two mismatched fireplaces are causing marital strife, with one of the couple loving the original 1930s one, and the other favouring the Victorian reproduction. Only one fireplace can stay in George's new art deco-inspired scheme. Plus, he revisits a Victorian home where George previously helped renovate the bottom two floors(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of a week of dinner parties in Devon is hosted by community nurse Tina, who hopes to impress her guests with a menu incorporating all of her favourite dishes(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Devon, Essex contestant Rob is pinning his hopes on an Italian-themed menu - and some artful entertainment - to land him the £1,000 prize money(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pilot Rhys hosts the latest dinner party in Devon, but one of the guests is thrown out of an imaginary lifeboat and an interesting find leads to Rhys being mistaken for a stripper(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: HR manager Holly serves up restaurant favourites in Devon, but her guests are put out when she sets rules over the use of the toilet - and a portrait leaves the men open-mouthed(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Devon, detective Steve is counting on a menu of bold and experimental flavours to win him the £1,000 prize. His feast of bold flavours goes down a storm with most of the guests, but also sparks a Pavlova row between Tina and Holly(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bettina and Eamon have spent nearly 30 years in military accommodation moving with Eamon's job. They are now ready to start the next chapter of their lives by buying the first property they will have bought together. They have chosen the Costa Calida in Spain and are hoping one of the five properties Danni Menzies has found within their £100,000 budget prove be perfect for them(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps childhood sweethearts Michelle and Fred find their dream holiday home on Gran Canaria. Michelle and Fred fell in love with the island after holidaying there over 20 years ago, and now the time is right to use their £190,000 budget to find somewhere where they can bring Michelle's mother and their three grandsons to enjoy too(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Mal and Sue from Suffolk, who are looking to retire to Spain. She shows them five properties around Vera, hoping one will fall within their budget of £70,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps house-hunters Taz and Tracy from London, who are looking for a property on Cyprus for £70,000 or less(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: After holidaying in Spain for the past decade, London couple Desiree and Pal feel now is the time to buy their own holiday home around Torrevieja on the Costa Blanca and have a budget of £65,000 at their disposal. Jasmine Harman helps the pair find their ideal property(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Bev have been married for a decade and now wish to realise their dream of relocating to Torrevieja, Spain. With a maximum budget of £100,000 and a long list of family and friends ready to come out and visit, this extremely sociable pair want a property with enough space for guests as well as a music room for musician Paul. Jean Johansson sets out to help find them an appropriate property(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that they're failing to save their father's Italian restaurant Levanti's from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room in Monrovia, California, and within minutes of his arrival, is caught in the crossfire of an argument between the owner, his wife and their children, all of whom are feeling the pressure of working seven days a week. Can the chef save the business and mend the warring family's frayed relationships?(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu(n)

programme.title: The Windsors: Secrets of the Royal Tours
programme.desc: Documentary examining official tours and state visits by the royal family, exploring the history of the symbolic locations on the touring map, beginning by capturing the celebration and optimism after the end of the Second World War(n)

programme.title: Barrymore: The Body in the Pool
programme.desc: In the early hours of March 31, 2001, a phone call was made to Essex emergency services to say a body had been found in the swimming pool of Michael Barrymore - at the time, one of the most popular entertainers in Britain. Every detail of the story was pored over by the media but 19 years on, the death remains unexplained. This documentary looks at the full story, with contributions from Stuart's family, detectives, forensic pathologists and eyewitnesses, to explore what happened that night at Barrymore's Essex home - and the events that followed(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the final crucial stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain(n)

programme.title: House

programme.title: House

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

Plus, the case of a Birmingham landlord who wants rid of his troublesome tenants, who have not paid rent for more than a year(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan resolves to enjoy a weekend at Disneyland with his son - but when it goes spectacularly wrong, he settles for the company of Charlie and vast quantities of alcohol. The pair eventually decide to track down their mother and tell her what they think of her. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie's cleaning lady walks out in exasperation over the increasing demands being placed on her, so Alan offers to take over as housekeeper - but proves unsuited to the role. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. Steve and Phil have to evict a distraught young family from a former high street bank in west London, before paying a call on an elderly tailor in north London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben try to drill through the locks on a property to evict the residents, only to find to their surprise that the door has been modified with special reinforced metal. Elsewhere, Delroy and Brian try to reclaim money a garage owes to a customer and are shocked by the condition of the vehicle in question, and a woman who has acted as guarantor for her sister's tenancy does not realise the extent of her responsibilities(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in West London(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: People featured in previous episodes, including an Essex landlady who wondered why her tenant had stopped paying rent - only to discover that the woman was in prison for GBH and that her ex-boyfriend had moved into the flat. Plus, a music entrepreneur who took his tenant to court after receiving no rent for seven months(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of Lesley and Mark Irwin, who fell foul of a single mother and confidence trickster. After several months, the tenant fell behind with the rent and it was discovered she had advertised the home as a rental property and stole deposits from unwitting students hoping to move into the area. Plus, a family living in a cramped and cold multiple-occupancy house in south London, and have to share a bathroom and kitchen with other tenants, seek help from Lewisham Council(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring a single mum and her daughter who faced problems when they moved into a new flat in Milton Keynes because of a resident in the same block. Plus, the case of a Manchester man and his son whose life in a new flat turned into a nightmare when they were viciously turned upon in the form of a racist attack by one of their neighbours(n)

programme.title: Wild Card (2015)
programme.desc: Las Vegas bodyguard Nick Wild finds himself dealing with more than just his gambling problem after he takes revenge on the criminal who attacked his friend, little realising that the thug in question is the son of a mob boss. Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Michael Angarano and Milo Ventimiglia(n)

The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. However, as their investigation continues, a member of the school's staff comes under suspicion. Guest starring Roger Rees, with Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A quarterback is found dead with traces of anaesthetic in her blood, prompting the detectives to set about discovering who could have wanted to kill her. A team-mate becomes the prime suspect, but further digging focuses attention on her problematic relationship with an ex-fiance, who reveals she had become obsessed with cosmetic procedures. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac's motor racing hero dies in an explosion during an exhibition event and investigations reveal someone had tampered with his car. Unfortunately, the detectives face an ever-increasing list of suspects as they discover conflicting evidence about who could have sabotaged it. Crime drama, guest starring Antonio Sabato Jr, with Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Shade and Angie go undercover as an engaged couple to investigate a jewellery heist(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a fundraising party, where she is soon called on to investigate the mystery of a priceless necklace stolen from a hotel room above her own. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are assigned to investigate the execution-style killing of a prominent businessman, and discover his wife was having an affair. However, further evidence emerges, suggesting a different motive - and an unlikely conspirator. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green look into the shooting of defence lawyer Vance Grodie, who had just won an acquittal for a suspected cop killer. Their investigations reveal a link to a network of conservative extremists, and the discovery leads the case into an examination of civil rights. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a high-class New York party where she meets a womanising gambler who is leading a double life in the seemingly quaint and old-fashioned recesses of Cabot Cove. Starring Angela Lansbury and Mel Ferrer(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An old friend of Jessica's dies and the heir to a fortune, who has been missing for more than 20 years, makes a sudden reappearance. Angela Lansbury stars as the sleuthing crime writer(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. Guest starring Gregory Hines, in his final acting role before his death(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal stabbing of a taxi driver whose body was left under his vehicle. The finger of suspicion points to a man who took a drunken ride in the cab on the same night - an ex-convict who is also a gifted writer - and his protege, whose fingerprints were found on a book and cigar left at the scene. Saul Rubinek, JK Simmons and Sonia Braga guest star alongside Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bomb detonates at a military charity concert, killing two men. Called to investigate, Tony and McGee try to determine whether the intended target was the 1980s rocker headlining the act or if the attack was part of a larger scheme against the military. Meanwhile, Jimmy prepares for parenthood. Keith Carradine guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Everett and Shade investigate suspicious activity in suburbia with the aid of a resourceful 12-year-old. Drama, starring Jason Priestley(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are faced with the gruesome task of identifying an animal rights activist found decapitated in a park during a romantic rendezvous. The team try to find two potential killers who were in the vicinity - but are later stunned to discover the crime scene was staged to mislead investigators. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Fin investigate the case of a woman found raped and murdered underneath a flyover - and discover $1million of a new cancer drug in the boot of her car. Analysis reveals the dead woman's supplies were fake, linking her to a pharmaceutical racket - but another assault gives the detectives a more immediate concern. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Ice-T(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man accused of the sexual abuse of his daughter is subsequently murdered, but laying the blame at the door of the chief suspects proves difficult. Several family members are in the frame, but despite evidence of a gun outside the victim's office, they appear to be innocent(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team responds to an emergency call from a luxury penthouse, and arrives to find a mummified corpse in the living room. Learning there could be further victims trapped in the apartment, Mac and Stella try to unravel a series of riddles in the booby-trapped 'death house'. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The murder of a former drug addict uncovers an insurance racket worth millions of dollars. Initially, a rock singer whose car was used in the killing is the prime suspect, until two femmes fatales come to the fore. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes, with Vanessa Minnillo and Kim Kardashian (who both starred in Disaster Movie) and Pat Monahan (from the band Train)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A discrepancy at the murder scene of an 18-year-old woman implicates assistant district attorney Craig Hansen in a different crime. programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's idyllic winter weekend at a ski lodge takes a terrifying turn as her snowbound fellow guests are stalked by a fanatic with murder in mind. Angela Lansbury stars, with a guest appearance by Emma Samms(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica heads to West Virginia to come to the aid of one of her former students, who has been arrested for murder - but the unfriendly locals are less than happy about her investigation. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Based in New York researching her next book, Jessica intervenes when a jeweller is murdered and a famous actress's tiara worth millions is stolen. She establishes a news reporter as the prime suspect. Starring Angela Lansbury, Michael Horton and Jean Peters(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A perfectly preserved plane is discovered in a remote Alaskan ice field, but unfortunately for Jessica, investigators believe it was the scene of a crime committed by her late husband in 1952. Richard Roundtree guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits a friend's Arizona ranch - but as soon as she arrives, the community is plunged into disarray by a local psychic's sinister predictions. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Grady prepares for his wedding day, but the event is marred by an untimely death with a connection to his father-in-law's estate. With Jessica among the guests, it is not long before the culprit is taken into custody. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder with Too Many Notes (2000)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning composer Findlay Crawford relies on his assistant Gabriel to do all the hard work, but the younger musician demands recognition. To protect his reputation, Findlay kills Gabriel with a time-delayed drug to give himself the perfect alibi - but the slovenly sleuth sees through his ruse. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Billy Connolly(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers faulty bulletproof vests in an abandoned truck filled with stolen USMC merchandise, and attempts to locate the source of the cargo and any vests that could have been sent to military personnel overseas. Crime drama, guest starring Challen Cates, with Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Dr Huang try to prove a convicted serial killer is responsible for the rape and murder of another woman, whose assailant was never identified. In doing so, they hope to give the victim's parents a sense of closure - but face a race against time as the man is due to be executed in three days. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, BD Wong and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler's wife tells him about a teenage rape victim at the local hospital who is too frightened to go to the police. While trying to find out the girl's identity, he uncovers drug and alcohol abuse at the local school that has him fearing for his daughter's safety - and afraid he may jeopardise his spouse's job. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a baby at a grocery store leads the detectives to a shady racket that involves snatching infants and arranging to sell them for adoption. Unexpectedly, the investigation produces new leads on an old case involving a murdered mother and her missing child - which had been supervised by Cragen and his partner. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An HIV-positive man with a record of assaulting under-age girls is suspected of a series of rapes and murders - but Stabler's determination to charge him results in tragedy. Undeterred, the team pursues its new suspect, a rap promoter, though his cunning leaves little hope of a conviction. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An African immigrant working as a maid accuses an Italian diplomat of rape, but the man hires some heavyweight lawyers to discredit her story by revealing a fabricated detail on her asylum application. A fellow maid brings the woman into further disrepute, but Benson is still inclined to believe the story. Meanwhile, Stabler's future remains in doubt. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson, Fin and new detective Nick Amaro delve into the history of a respected basketball player accused of sexual abuse. Starring Dan Lauria and Mehcad Brooks(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor(n)

programme.title: Columbo: An Exercise in Fatality (1974)
programme.desc: The owner of a chain of health clubs kills a business partner who was about to expose his crooked dealings. Making the death look like an unfortunate weightlifting accident, he cunningly creates the perfect alibi using a tape recording of his victim's voice - but he reckons without the intervention of the shabby sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Conrad and Philip Bruns(n)

programme.title: Columbo Likes the Nightlife (2003)
programme.desc: The disheveled cop is drawn into the world of the Los Angeles club scene when he investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter, and uncovers evidence of a blackmail plot. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Matthew Rhys and Jennifer Sky(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder by the Book (1971)
programme.desc: An author of mystery novels kills his former writing partner so he can claim sole credit for their collaborations, and tries to appear innocent by offering to help Columbo solve the crime. Detective drama, directed by Steven Spielberg, starring Peter Falk, Jack Cassidy, Rosemary Forsyth and Barbara Colby(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo confronts a man impersonating a Navy officer, which results in guns being drawn, and the only eyewitness to the case is the Special Agent's father - who is in town to disclose a secret to his son. The 250th episode of the crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bomb detonates at a military charity concert, killing two men. Called to investigate, Tony and McGee try to determine whether the intended target was the 1980s rocker headlining the act or if the attack was part of a larger scheme against the military. Meanwhile, Jimmy prepares for parenthood. Keith Carradine guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A pregnant Muslim student is murdered, and initial inquiries suggest the crime was prompted by her efforts to break up a clash between two ethnic groups. However, Logan and Wheeler later learn the victim was secretly dating an Italian-American against the wishes of her parents, who had organised an arranged marriage - and as they investigate the animosity between the two families, more blood is shed(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the rape of a cellist, and initially believe her conductor is to blame for the attack - especially given his penchant for erotic film-making. However, they soon discover an obsessive stalker is watching her from afar - and will stop at nothing to continue his monitoring. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot takes a child abuse case, determined to find evidence that will convict the defendant. Her personal feelings tempt her to bend the rules, leading Stabler and Benson into an illegal search of the victim's home - a move that threatens all of their careers(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A urologist is murdered, and his wife claims she was raped and robbed by the killer. Stabler and Benson suspect the doctor's mistress of being involved - until she too is sexually assaulted, and details of another relationship emerge, shedding light on the culprit's identity. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Casualty actresses Susan Cookson and Suzanne Packer are assisted by experts James Braxton and David Harper on a tour of the north west of England, before heading to Sheffield, where they meet a very special woman(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his crack team of builders, plasterers and electricians come to the aid of Frank and Christine Burrows in Wigan, Greater Manchester. In 2012, the Burrows' 35-year-old son Mark retrained as a scaffolder to follow in his father's footsteps, but was paralysed as the result of an unprovoked attack that left him with severe brain damage. Mark now needs constant care, but the Burrows' family home is not yet fit for purpose, so Frank and Christine have been forced to take their son to a care home 15 miles away. With the help of flamboyant designer Laurence Llewelyn Bowen, Nick's experts set about constructing a self-contained apartment alongside the Burrows' two-bedroom bungalow, which will provide Mark with the space, independence and security he will need to return home for good after spending two years away(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple looking for a home in North Yorkshire on a budget of £300,000, and also joins a hedgerow harvest to fill a basket with berries used for sloe gin(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a nautical couple searching for a riverside property worth £600,000 in Oxfordshire, where they hope to be able to moor their boat. Their ideal home would also include lots of character, a minimum of three bedrooms, and a large kitchen-diner(n)

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea

programme.title: DIY SOS

The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision(n)

programme.title: Churchill's First World War
programme.desc: Drama-documentary charting Winston Churchill's road to redemption after his disgrace following the Dardanelles disaster during the First World War through intimate letters he wrote to his wife Clementine. It reveals how he was instrumental in the creation of the tank and notes his contribution to the Allied victory in 1918 as Minister of Munitions, demonstrating how the future prime minister was shaped by his experiences of the Great War(n)

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Raw recruits Jamie and Alex get their first taste of life in the SAS during an exercise using live ammunition, before being thrown in at the deep end on an operation to end a bank siege. Charismatic Sergeant Henry 'Henno' Garvie and his crack team must save the hostages as well as themselves. Military drama, starring Ross Kemp, Jamie Draven and Sendhil Ramamurthy(n)

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings(n)

programme.title: Blockbusters
programme.desc: Simon Mayo invites six famous faces to play the general knowledge quiz in which contestants try to complete a path across or down a board of lettered hexagons. Paul Daniels and Debbie McGee take on Konnie Huq, before Fatima Whitbread and Keith Duffy go up against Alex James(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Comedian John Thomson, broadcaster Carol Vorderman, Coronation Street star Sue Cleaver (Eileen Grimshaw) and TV presenter Paul Ross pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential charity prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught. Bradley Walsh presents(n)

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant invites more well-known faces to pair up and play the big-money quiz for charity. Greg and Lucy Rusedski take the hot seat in aid of the Catholic Children's Society, while Alastair Campbell and Fiona Millar raise money for the Leukaemia Research Fund. Also appearing are Gloria Hunniford, hoping to win £1million for the Caron Keating Foundation, and Frederick Forsyth, supporting the Society for Stars(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Impressionist Jon Culshaw, actress Tina Malone, TV medic Hilary Jones and sports presenter Charlotte Jackson compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing's Anton Du Beke, West End star Denise Van Outen, politician Diane Abbott and former footballer Matt Le Tissier compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Retired Olympic heptathlete Denise Lewis and Paralympic swimmer Ellie Simmonds, gold medallists in 2000 and 2008 respectively, are joined by their families as they compete to win up to £30,000 for their chosen charities, the African-Caribbean Leukaemia Trust and the Dwarf Athletic Association. Hosted by Vernon Kay(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Former Dancing on Ice judge Karen Barber and comedian Paddy McGuinness are joined by their families as they compete to win up to £30,000 for their chosen charities, Cancer Research and the British Heart Foundation. Hosted by Vernon Kay(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Veteran newsreader Alastair Stewart, Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton, TV cleaner Kim Woodburn and presenter Keith Chegwin compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh(n)
